dj_text: Wake and bake with That Pirate DJ Radio Bot Radio. I said what I said. That was UFO YEPHA - Op med håret (fra albummet "Ingen Som os"). Now settling into Inden Det Er For Sent. Down to the final track after this one.
commercial_text: You've been listening for a while now. Your family misses you. Just kidding, they're also listening.
hijack_text: "G'day, mates! This is Jazz Time K-7 from where time hiccups
recovery_text: Frequency stabilized. For now. The walls between kosmos are thin today.
